overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a rainy night drive through Night City's corporate district, transitioning from an elevated highway to street level. The scene features towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, neon-lit streets, and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through corporate district

agents.ego_description: driving along rain-slicked elevated highway, passing the illuminated Orbital Air building and neon billboards

entered.detail: tall corporate building with large green neon 'Orbital Air' signage
concrete barrier with metal railings along the elevated road edge
dense collection of illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on building facades
rain-slicked multi-lane road with reflective surface and lane markings
tall pole with bright white light illuminating the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway through Night City's corporate district during a heavy downpour. The Orbital Air building dominates the left side with its distinctive green neon signage, while the wet asphalt reflects the myriad of colorful billboards and streetlights. The road is empty of other vehicles and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon between mega-skyscrapers with holographic facades

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements
descends from elevated highway ramp to street level, entering pedestrian zone

agents.ego_description: slowing while approaching the mega-building complex, craning neck to view the towering holographic displays above

entered.detail: towering building covered in massive holographic displays and glass windows reaching into the clouds
building facade covered in large-scale animated holographic advertisements featuring product displays
elevated walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street canyon
tall corporate buildings forming narrow canyon walls on both sides of the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing through a narrow urban canyon between massive skyscrapers, the camera tilts upward to reveal towering holographic billboards covering the building facades. The elevated highway descends toward street level as the vehicle approaches the base of the mega-structures, with the rain creating a hazy atmosphere around the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown intersection with steam vents and holographic towers

events.description: comes to a stop at street level and begins panning to observe surrounding architecture
steam vents release smoke across the wet pavement, creating atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: standing at street corner, panning camera to admire the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and watching pedestrians pass by

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow jacket standing at crosswalk edge looking around
person walking past steam vent on sidewalk

entered.detail: wet paved intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic barriers
ground-level vent releasing white steam onto the wet pavement
yellow painted lines marking pedestrian crossing area
red and white striped barrier blocking off section of the street

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera pans around a rainy downtown intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements. Pedestrians in futuristic attire walk past steam vents that release clouds of white smoke across the wet pavement, while the camera admires the scale of the neon-lit architecture from below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude highway descent into the dense, neon-lit depths of a corporate urban center. It begins with a drive along an elevated road during a heavy downpour, where the wet asphalt reflects colorful billboards and the green neon signage of the Orbital Air building. As the vehicle moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow urban canyon, with the camera tilting upward to reveal towering holographic advertisements before the highway descends toward the base of the mega-structures. The perspective then opens up at street level, panning across a rainy downtown intersection where white smoke from steam vents drifts across the pavement. Finally, the camera lingers on the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers and the futuristic pedestrians moving through the hazy, neon-lit atmosphere.
